claim_boundary: This Suite Blueprint is an example input only. It does not prove child skill acceptance, runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, tests, suite automation, package publication, release readiness, code-contract validation, external services, or future AI behavior.
evidence_policy: current direct evidence required before suite or child acceptance

member_skills.description: Use when a maintainer needs bounded repository-note review inside the example suite.
member_skills.name: example-suite-review
member_skills.purpose: Maintain example review notes with visible evidence and claim boundaries.
